name: AutoGPT
description: An experimental open-source attempt to make GPT-4 fully autonomous. AutoGPT chains LLM 'thoughts' to autonomously achieve complex goals with minimal human interaction.

name: LangChain
description: A framework for developing applications powered by language models. Build context-aware, reasoning applications with LLMs via composable chains and agents.

name: Prompt Engineering Guide
description: A comprehensive guide to prompt engineering techniques for large language models. Includes few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, ReAct, and more.

name: OpenInterpreter
description: A natural language interface for computers. Open Interpreter lets LLMs run code locally, enabling a terminal-like chat interface for file system and browser tasks.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: AI-powered UI generation tool by Vercel. Generate production-ready React + Tailwind UI components from natural language descriptions with live preview.

name: Fabric
description: An open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. Fabric provides a collection of reusable prompt patterns and a CLI to integrate AI into your workflow.

name: Crew AI
description: A framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. CrewAI enables agents to collaborate and tackle complex tasks with defined roles and goals.

name: GPT CLI
description: A simple yet powerful command-line interface for interacting with OpenAI GPT models. Supports streaming, context management, and plugin-based extensibility.
